summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of new Analytics Dashboard (/admin/dashboard) and Contact Management (/admin/contact) pages. All requested features tested and working correctly.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height (-1) during initial render. Non-blocking, charts render correctly after container sizing.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.jsx missing data-testid on password input and login button - currently using #password and button[type='submit'] selectors
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: Analytics Dashboard with summary cards (Total: 13, Contacts: 9, Affiliates: 4), lead trend chart with date range buttons (7 Hari, 30 Hari, 3 Bulan, 1 Tahun, Semua) and period buttons (Harian, Mingguan, Bulanan, Tahunan), affiliator performance section with bar chart and table showing test_affiliator and dimas. Contact management page with tabs, filters, export to Excel buttons. Navigation between pages working both ways.

analytics_dashboard: ✓ Lead trend chart rendered with bars
✓ Date range '7 Hari' button clickable and functional
✓ Date range '30 Hari' button clickable and functional
✓ Date range '3 Bulan' button clickable and functional
✓ Date range '1 Tahun' button clickable and functional
✓ Date range 'Semua' button clickable and functional
✓ Affiliator table with columns: #, Affiliator, Total Lead, Lead Terbaru
contacts_page: ✓ Filter inputs: name, email, phone, organization, date range
✓ Export to Excel button showing '9 data' for contacts
✓ Export to Excel button showing '4 data' for leads
✓ WhatsApp and Email quick action buttons on cards
